# BLITZ Builder

{% hint style="warning" %}
Before Trying To Install The Builder, Please Ensure You Have[ <mark style="color:red;">Node.js</mark>](https://nodejs.org/en) And [<mark style="color:red;">NPM</mark>](https://www.npmjs.com/) Installed
{% endhint %}



## NPM Install

```batch
npm install @blitz-bots/builder
```
